ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] mohitagw15856/pm-claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mohitagw15856/pm-claude-skills
Language: html
In Anthropic's official Claude plugin directory · 515 professional Agent Skills (PRDs, launches, compliance, CVs & more) for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor & Codex. Try free in-browser, or 'npx pm-claude-skills add'.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [css] thedevdojo/wave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedevdojo/wave
Language: css
Wave - The Software as a Service Starter Kit, designed to help you build the SAAS of your dreams 🚀 💰

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] yvgude/lean-ctx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yvgude/lean-ctx
Language: rust
Control what your AI can see. LeanCTX (Lean Context) is the context intelligence layer for AI agents — one local Rust binary that decides what they read, remembers what they learn, guards what they touch, and proves what they save. 60–90% fewer tokens as the receipt. 76 MCP tools, 30+ agents, local-first.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos-framework
Language: python
Our inference and training framework to run on the Cosmos Models

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsPLK/ps5-payload-manager
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [vue] geekgeekrun/geekgeekrun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geekgeekrun/geekgeekrun
Language: vue
牛人快跑 - GeekGeekRun，求职找工作自动化工具，基于 Puppeteer、Electron。界面友好，简单易用！开源，免费！快速海投、自动开聊、已读不回提醒、职位信息抓取、不合适职位标记、僵尸职位清理；让你即刻变身成为一台冇得感情的求职机器🤖，找工作不内耗。宝宝不用动，妈妈全自动~祝你收获好Offer！

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adil192/no_more_background
Language: dart
A fire-and-forget program to stop Android apps from running in the background.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Skill that audits and rewrites content to remove AI writing patterns. Use it with your favorite agents including Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes.
